case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY VS. RUBEN A PATRICIO et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-07-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-21-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY SERVED NOV-28-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICIO, RUBEN A

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-25-2006 CONTINUED TO MAR-15-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). JAN-25-2006 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATRICIO, RUBEN A $5,812.71 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $677.34 INTEREST, $291.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,706.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
